# CWE-341 safe — Predictable from Observable State (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-341-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func CreateDeviceToken(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 24)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	token := hex.EncodeToString(buf)
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO device_tokens (token) VALUES (?)", token)
}
